reasoning: As of the knowledge cutoff (May 8, 2025), significant evidence indicates that Egypt is in the final stages of being chosen to host the 2026 ITKF Traditional Karate World Championship. Specifically, on April 29, 2025, the Egyptian Minister of Youth and Sports met with the ITKF President, Gilberto Gaertner, to discuss and formally advance Egypt's bid for the 2026 event. High-level ministerial meetings with federation presidents almost always precede a formal announcement within a few weeks or months. Furthermore, Egypt is a reigning world champion and a dominant force in the ITKF, making them the primary candidate. Given the timing of these formal discussions (April 2025), it is extremely probable that an official announcement will be made by ITKF before the July 1, 2025 deadline.
